data.content:
This is an NUnit project on VSTest. Use `--filter` with the `ClassName` qualifier:

```
dotnet test --filter ClassName~ReportExporterTests
```

Or the fully-qualified form:

```
dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests
```

Both will run only the two tests in `ReportExporterTests`, skipping `ReportGeneratorTests`.
